turns.tutor_turn:
Now try this similar problem on your own without any hints. Show your reasoning step by step:

The ski lift carries skiers all the way from the bottom of the mountain to the very top of the mountain, and then drops them off so they can ski back down the mountain. If it takes a skier 22.5 minutes to ride the lift from the bottom to the top of the mountain, and then it takes 6.8 minutes to ski back down the mountain, what is the most number of times a person can ski down the mountain in 2.6 hours?
